commands.review_summary:
The PR removes fake artifact-kind prefixes from publisher catalog list rows, replaces publisher loading card skeletons with list skeletons, and adds row-title regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows publisher list rows render `@{item.kind}` plus `/` before the display name, which matches the cleanup target.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No automated code repair is needed; the PR needs maintainer review plus inspectable UI proof before merge.

target.title: fix: clean up publisher catalog rows
target.body:
## Summary
- remove the fake `@skill /` and `@plugin /` artifact-kind prefixes from publisher catalog list rows
- switch publisher profile loading placeholders from card skeletons to row-shaped result skeletons
- add regression tests for skill and plugin publisher-row titles

## Validation
- `bunx vitest run src/components/PublishedItemCard.test.tsx`
- `bun run format:check -- 'src/routes/user/$handle.tsx' src/components/PublishedItemCard.test.tsx src/components/Header.tsx src/components/SkillListItem.tsx src/components/PluginListItem.tsx src/components/SkillListItem.test.tsx src/components/PluginListItem.test.tsx`
- `bun run ci:static`
- `bun run ci:unit`
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
- local browser proof at `http://localhost:3000/user/local-official-org`: publisher rows no longer contain `@skill`/`@plugin`
- local browser loading proof with an uncached profile: one row-status list, six `.skill-list-item` skeleton rows, zero `.skill-card` skeletons
target.author: patrick-erichsen
